title: monochaete fastigiata
side_effects: Monochaete fastigiata can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap may lead to skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Incorrect handling and preparation of the plant can also cause eye irritation and blurred vision.
